        "font.family": "serif",

label: main
peekOfCode:
def main() -> None:
    raw = pd.read_csv(RAW)
    summary = summarize(raw)
    SUMMARY.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    summary.to_csv(SUMMARY, index=False)
    make_plot(summary)
if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
